title: nautilocalyx villosus
intro: Nautilocalyx villosus, also known as the hairy nautilocalyx, is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Nautilocalyx villosus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
